name: Slow Cooker Beef Tips
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup chopped shallots or green onions
1/4 cup dry red wine or water
recipeInstructions:
Serves 8 to 10
1. Combine the flour with the salt and pepper, then toss with the beef cubes until thoroughly coated.
2. Place the seasoned beef in the Crock-Pot.
3. Add shallots and mushrooms.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the beef broth, Worcestershire sauce, and tomato paste (or ketchup).
5. Pour the beef broth mixture over the beef and vegetables; stir well to ensure even coating.
6. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 12 hours or on High for 4 to 6 hours.
7. One hour before serving, turn the setting to High.
8. Make a smooth paste of red wine (or water) and 3 tablespoons flour.
9. Stir the paste into the Crock-Pot, mixing well.
10. Cover and cook until thickened.
11. Serve over hot buttered noodles.
